title: Dusty Decorations
description: A decoration mod themed around ports and markets
body:
![Dusty Decoration's logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/124a7dbad4236ab40a5d8cf2f4031ca3c12ac634.png)

Dusty Decorations adds many rustic blocks for you to decorate your world with.

![Screenshot of a minecraft market, with 2 stalls in front of a sea-side house. Modded blocks such as papers and jars litter the floor and stalls.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KgFOuaiZ/images/20b82dc68b444e4a27bff115f629fc1b5ffb4d1f.png)

**NOTE: 1.20.1+ versions require Geckolib**

Most blocks are themed around ports and markets, with a rustic and feel. Some of the included blocks are: Barrels of food, pots and pans, buoys, jars, books, scattered paper and posters, awnings, and more.

Many of the blocks have randomized textures and models to keep builds from seeming repetitive, and some have small features such as climbable rope. All blocks are craftable in survival with simple recipes.

<details>
  <summary>List of blocks</summary>
  


Food Barrels: Includes variants for most food types, such as potatoes, apples, cod, and berries

Hanging Fish: fish hanging from rope, designed to connect to above blocks such as chains and rope

Shelves: Can be used to place blocks on, or as tables, building supports, and more

Hanging Knives: Perfect for Kitchens

Posters and Scattered Paper: Over 10 randomized textures to fill up your walls and floors

Rope: Rotatable and climbable

Jars: Random textures and models, perfect for filling up space

Corrugated Metal: A rusty metal suited for a old roof, and it includes a awning

Wedged knives and cutting boards: A knife wedged into a surface or cutting board. The cutting board is also placeable separately

Cluttered shelf and Small Bookshelf: A small shelf with randomized textures. Can have books or jars on it

Books and Book Stack. Books to either place on a shelf or stack on top of each other

Paper Stack: Can be stacked on shelves or itself

Awnings: Can be used on top of windows or with carpet roofs

Life Preservers, Anchors, Large and Small Glass Buoys, and Treasure Map: Some seaside decor

Wooden Buoys: Colorful buoys hanging from rope, great decoration to hang on walls

Cooking Pots, Frying Pans, Pots And Pans Stack, and Placeable Bowl: Great decorations for a crowded kitchen


</details>

Available for Forge 1.19.3 and 1.19.2

or Fabric 1.20.1

Fabric version coded by Mhaks

1.20.1 Forge and NeoForge versions coded by RedKoopa (marioz170)
